title: Treasure DAO - REKT
relevance_summary: Logic bug in buyItem function allowing zero quantity purchases

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls buyItem() with _quantity <= 0

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls buyItem() with _quantity <= 0
summary: A logic bug in the Treasure DAO Marketplace's buyItem function allowed attackers to purchase items for zero fees, leading to the theft of $1.4M worth of NFTs. A simple fix involving checking for positive quantities could have prevented this.
